## [00:00 - 01:59]

Now it's your turn. What are you going to do different than your parents and your grandparents? I made a decision to break the cycle of constantly being worried about money. I traded owning a home for having money come to me every month. I traded owning a home and being in one location to spend time and energy researching real estate that will pay me forever. See my take is just owning a home is not owning real estate, but that's an essential lesson that you got to figure out for yourself. There's another powerful real estate opportunity waiting for you that was waiting for your family and your grandparents by the way and a handful of people found years ago. This is a proven formula for creating wealth long term. The other side of the conversation is investing in real estate that pays you every month that reduces the debt while you wait and appreciates over time. If you can shake your traditional understanding of real estate just being a home and focus on becoming a real estate investor, even a real estate mogul, you can make unbelievable amounts of money create phenomenal wealth for you and your family. And maybe that's what you've been craving for. I know it is what I always wanted. The best way to do that is to invest in apartment buildings. This module picks up from that vantage point that you understand both sides of the real estate coin and that you can see the unparalleled value apartment buildings have over other options. I'll be sharing with you the specific apartment niches specifically the different ways you can and should invest in profitable high potential opportunities based on your wants needs and goals. By the end of this I want you to understand the different and specific approaches to long term wealth and financial freedom and from there have a sense of the concrete steps and the path that you'll take to get there.
